name: Indo-Zambia Bank Limited
description: Indo-Zambia Bank Limited (IZB) is a commercial bank jointly owned by the Governments of Zambia and India, established as a symbol of bilateral cooperation. Listed on the LuSE Main Board since 2007, IZB provides retail banking, corporate banking, and trade finance services, with a particular focus on facilitating Zambia-India trade and investment flows. The bank has a growing branch network and serves both Zambian corporates and the Indian diaspora business community.

analystNotes.note: Indo-Zambia Bank is a profitable niche bank (K724M PAT, +19.8% YoY) with sovereign backing from two governments. The K150M dividend declaration signals confidence. However, detailed financial data is surprisingly scarce for a Main Board-listed bank — no revenue breakdown, balance sheet, or ratio data was accessible from standard sources. The companies.json PE of 7.2x appears inconsistent with K724M profit against K780M market cap (which would imply PE ~1.1x). Either the market cap or earnings figure is stale. Limited free float (25%) and thin trading make this a quasi-sovereign entity rather than a public market stock. UNABLE TO BUILD FULL PROFILE — DATA GATHERING NEEDED.
analystNotes.author: Vituli Musukuma, PhD

riskRating: MEDIUM — INSUFFICIENT DATA FOR FULL ASSESSMENT
riskFactors: Insufficient publicly available financial data for thorough analysis
Government joint venture — political and governance risks
Low free float (25%) — limited secondary market liquidity
Concentration risk in Zambia-India trade corridor
investmentThesis: Indo-Zambia Bank is a profitable, government-backed niche bank that appears cheap on headline metrics but lacks the financial transparency needed for credible analysis. Until detailed audited financial statements (income statement, balance sheet, key ratios) are obtained, no investment thesis can be formed.
dataSources: Indo Zambia Bank FY2024 AGM Press Briefing (izb.co.zm, Zambia Monitor, Daily Nation)
dataQuality: LOW — Only net profit and dividend from press reports confirmed. No detailed financial statements accessed. Companies.json PE and yield need reconciliation. Full annual report retrieval needed.
